title: cheilanthes intermedia
intro: Cheilanthes intermedia, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It is a native plant to New Zealand and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as boost the immune system. Cheilanthes intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reduced stress and improved digestive health.
